summary: Grade Filtering Bug Fix Verified - All tests passed. The fix in TopicPage.jsx line 264 correctly preserves grade filter when navigating to subtopics. Backend API correctly filters content by grade.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/content/topics/topic_80e910ce6a69?grade=3 returns 0 content items (all content is grade 0-0)
✅ Backend: GET /api/content/topics?grade=3 returns only topics that include grade 3
✅ Backend: GET /api/content/topics?grade=0 returns only topics that include grade 0
✅ Backend: Topic detail API correctly filters subtopics by grade
✅ Backend: No grade filter returns all content
✅ Frontend: Grade filter preserved in URL when navigating from LearnPage to TopicPage (/learn?grade=3 -> /learn/topic/topic_id?grade=3)
✅ Frontend: Grade filter preserved in URL when navigating from TopicPage to Subtopic (/learn/topic/topic_id?grade=3 -> /learn/topic/subtopic_id?grade=3)
✅ Frontend: Indian Rupee topic with grade=3 shows 'Coming Soon!' (0 content items - expected)
✅ Frontend: Indian Rupee topic with grade=0 shows 7 content items (Learning Content section visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly applied in TopicPage.jsx line 264 - grade filter now passed to subtopic Link component
LearnPage.jsx correctly passes gradeFilter in topic and subtopic links (lines 182, 269)
Backend content.py get_topic_detail() function properly handles grade filtering with $and conditions
seed_data_creation: Created test teacher user and classroom (grade 3) for testing grade filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grade filtering bug is fixed and verified. The fix was in TopicPage.jsx line 264 where gradeFilter was not being passed to subtopic Link components. Test teacher user (test_grade_filter_teacher_001) and classroom (Test Grade 3 Class, grade 3) created for testing. Indian Rupee topic (topic_80e910ce6a69) is a good test case - it has min_grade=0, max_grade=3 but all content items are grade 0-0, so grade 3 should show 0 items while grade 0 shows 7 items.
